model_specification_line: res = smf.wls(formula='fulltime ~ post_x_elig + eligible + C(year) + C(statefip) + age + I(age**2) + C(sex)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='HC1')
sample_selection: yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (immigrated by 2007, satisfying 5-year US residence requirement)
year in [2009, 2010, 2011, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016] (pre/post window; 2012 dropped as DACA transition year)
birthyr >= 1972 and birthyr <= 1996 (covers control cohort 1972-1981 and treated cohort 1982-1996)
